text: Being here, I am struck by a sense of curiosity, mingled with a tinge of vulnerability. The sterile, public atmosphere of the hallway leads into a purposeful, almost cerebral zone beyond the glass. As I approach the exhibition, I find myself reflected in its theme: the complexities of perception, the push and pull between being understood or misunderstood. The words displayed resonate deeply, evoking a gentle self-awareness. It is humbling—and oddly comforting—to acknowledge my own uncertainties within this space dedicated to research, development, and the fragile art of human connection.
